3111770.name: 通不了关吧(Can you finish it?)
3111770.description: Control the small square to reach the hidden small square in the green line, which seems simple but is actually difficult, (There are many characteristics that make it difficult for you to clear the level) (if the game buys a thousand copies, the author will make a summer-style SLG game)(If you don't think it's difficult, you can comment on the author, and the difficulty will be increased)Use the keyboard arrow keys and keyboard spaces to control the character,
3111770.supported_languages:
英语*, 简体中文*, 繁体中文*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
